description_long: This advertising board consists of a rectangular printed sign mounted on a single vertical pole with a square base. The sign features a vibrant image of a red and blue tractor in a golden field, accompanied by Russian text and branding, suggesting agricultural or machinery advertising. The board is supported by a metallic or painted pole, which is anchored to a sturdy, dark-colored base for stability. The sign panel appears to be made of a rigid material, likely metal or composite, with a smooth, matte finish. The frame is minimal, with no visible decorative elements, focusing attention on the advertisement itself. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components on the board.
description: A freestanding, pole-mounted advertising board with a printed agricultural advertisement in Russian, supported by a sturdy base and minimal frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full advertisement with tractor imagery and Russian text, mounted on a single pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign panel and the supporting pole, with minimal frame thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same advertisement and structural features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the pole's attachment to the base.
attribute_frame_design: thin metal frame with straight edges and no decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for agricultural machinery with Russian text and tractor imagery
